title: Bridge Essay: Psychedelics, Meditation, and Self-Consciousness.
concept: Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

**Psychedelics, Meditation, and Self-Consciousness.** - Front Psychol (2018). DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2018.01475. PMID: 30245648. In recent years, the scientific study of meditation and psychedelic drugs has seen remarkable developments. The increased focus on meditation in cognitive neuroscience has led to a cross-cultural classification of standard meditation styles validated by functional and structural neuroanatomical data. Meanwhile, the renaissance of psychedelic research has shed light on the neurophysiology of altered states of consciousness induced by classical psychedelics, such as psilocybin and LSD, whose effec
